text: There's substantive overlap with `pty-baseline` (same repo, same SDK-removal motivation), but the proposed architecture differs materially — pty-baseline ships a minimal PTY shell; this seed proposes structured `ChatItem` frames from JSONL tailing + tmux backend. Surfacing the overlap question per protocol.

questions.question: The new seed overlaps with existing project `pty-baseline` (same repo, same goal of removing `@anthropic-ai/claude-agent-sdk`). However, the architectures differ: pty-baseline ships a minimal xterm.js + node-pty terminal shell; this seed proposes a hand-rolled JSONL tail bridge with tmux backend driving the structured chat UI. Continue pty-baseline, or create a new project for this pivot?

options.label: Create new project (Recommended)
options.description: Materially different architecture (structured ChatItem frames vs raw terminal bytes). Treat as a new spec→review cycle.

options.label: Continue pty-baseline
options.description: Resume the existing pty-baseline project instead of creating a new one.

However, the architectures differ: pty-baseline ships a minimal xterm.js + node-pty terminal shell; this seed proposes a hand-rolled JSONL tail bridge with tmux backend driving the structured chat UI. Continue pty-baseline, or create a new project for this pivot?"="Create new project (Recommended)". You can now continue with these answers in mind.
